sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69608" key="mwrobla/pths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μωρο-βλάπτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n69608.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pestilent fool</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> in <title_ TEIform="title">Script.Physiogn.</title_> ii <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.126</biblScope> </bibl> Foerster.</sense> </entryFree>
